Pañcakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/205Brāhmaṇava.text: Sampannaṁ āgatā pavattā (Ka) Saṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 249 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Sattakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/Mahāyaññavagg.text: Abhi 1. 145 piṭṭhe. 2. Saṁ 1. 51 piṭṭhe. 3. Saṇṭhānaṁ (Abhi-Ṭṭha 1. 343 piṭṭhe.)

Sattakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/Abyākatavagga.text: Khu 1. 231; Dī 3. 182; Aṁ 3. 72 piṭṭhesu. 4. Aṁ 1. 342 piṭṭhe.
Dī 1. 69; Ma 1. 215; Saṁ 1. 413 piṭṭhesu. 13. Saṁ 2. 409; Khu 1. 227 piṭṭhesu.

Paṭhamapaṇṇāsaka/Mettāvagga/Mettāsuttava.text: Vācāya piyassa piyakarassa kammaṁ vācāpeyyaṁ (Saṁ-Ṭī 1. 179 piṭṭhe.)

Aṭṭhakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/Mahāvagga/Ver.text: Sārattha-Ṭī 1. 338 piṭṭhādīsupi passitabbaṁ. 2. Aṁ 1. 328 piṭṭhe. 3. Dī 2. 13 piṭṭhe.

Aṭṭhakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/Mahāvagga/Pah.text: Lokiyaratananimittaṁ Udāna-Ṭṭha 275 piṭṭhe Sārattha-Ṭī 3. 431 piṭṭhe ca.
Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 35; Saṁ 3. 190; Khuddakapāṭha-Ṭṭha 143; Suttanipāta-Ṭṭha 1. 272; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 231 piṭṭhesupi.

Paṭhamapaṇṇāsaka/Sambodhivagga/Meghiyasu.text: Paramāṇumattaṁ aṭṭhasaṭṭhiyojanasahassādhikayojanasatasahassubbedhasine- rupabbatarājasadisaṁ (Ka) Itivuttaka-Ṭṭha 293 piṭṭhe ceva Visuddhi-Ṭī 1. 46 piṭṭhe ca passitabbaṁ.

Dasakanipātaaṅguttaraṭīkā/72Yamakavagga/.text: Dī-Ṭī 1. 128; Sī-Ṭī Abhinava 1. 366; Saṁ-Ṭī 2. 539 piṭṭhādīsupi passitabbaṁ.
